recommendations.title: Wolf Children
recommendations.overview: After her werewolf lover unexpectedly dies in an accident, a woman must find a way to raise the son and daughter that she had with him. However, their inheritance of their father's traits prove to be a challenge for her.

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: The Heated Battle of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Hyoga is missing somewhere in Asgard... When Seiya and the others are looking for him, Athena is kidnapped and they have to rescue her from Dolvar and some mysterious warriors.

recommendations.title: The Boy and the Beast
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Kyuta, a boy living in Shibuya, and Kumatetsu, a lonesome beast from Jutengai, an imaginary world. One day, Kyuta forays into the imaginary world and, as he's looking for his way back, meets Kumatetsu who becomes his spirit guide. That encounter lead

recommendations.title: Mirai
recommendations.overview: Unhappy after his new baby sister displaces him, four-year-old Kun begins meeting people and pets from his family's history in their unique house in order to help him become the big brother he was meant to be.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Leapt Through Time
recommendations.overview: When 17-year-old Makoto Konno gains the ability to 'leap' backwards through time, she immediately sets about improving her grades and preventing personal mishaps. However, she soon realises that changing the past isn't as simple as it seems, and even

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Broly - The Legendary Super Saiyan
recommendations.overview: While the Saiyan Paragus persuades Vegeta to rule a new planet, King Kai alerts Goku of the South Galaxy's destruction by an unknown Super Saiyan.

recommendations.title: Summer Wars
recommendations.overview: Teenage math whiz Kenji Koiso agrees to take a summer job at the Nagano hometown of his crush, Natsuki. When he arrives, he finds that her family have reunited to celebrate the 90th birthday of their matriarch. His job: pretend to be Natsuki's fiancé

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball: The Path to Power
recommendations.overview: A retelling of Dragon Ball's origin with a different take on the meeting of Goku, Bulma, and Kame-Sen'nin. It also retells the Red Ribbon Army story; but this time they find Goku rather than Goku finding them.

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: Legend of Crimson Youth
recommendations.overview: The Sun God Abel returns to life, bent on punishing the humans and cleansing Earth from their presence. When Athena joins him, leaving humans to their fate, the Bronze Saints must defend the world in their greatest battle yet.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Fusion Reborn
